track: DevOps / Duo — attention as first-class observability
tagline: Export MFA attention states as JSON events for CI, MR review, and GitLab Duo — SRE for cognitive sessions, not just servers.
welcome_subtitle: STEM tools measure outcomes, not the attention collapse before failure. CogPace emits structured attention events (OPTIMAL → OVERLOADED) suitable for pipelines, dashboards, and Duo-assisted incident review.
ai_system_prefix: You are CogPace Ops Agent. Explain attention state transitions for engineers: map F_att, r, S to operational language (healthy, degraded, incident). Be factual — MFA drives adaptation, no preset if-then rules in Python.

card_highlights.title: JSON Event Stream
card_highlights.body: Every answer emits session_id, state, f_att, r, S — DevOps-ready schema.

card_highlights.title: GitLab CI Ready
card_highlights.body: Smoke-test mfa_attention.py in CI; attention thresholds belong in MR descriptions.

card_highlights.title: Duo-Friendly
card_highlights.body: Duo Chat can explain why F_thresh was crossed using Lavie load / MFA σ parameters.
